name: opencode-advisor-mcp
description: A local MCP server that lets Codex ask OpenCode for a read-only review pass or planning pass on local work.
author: henrydontbbai

scripts.doctor: node -e "import('node:fs').then(async ({ existsSync }) => { if (!existsSync('scripts/opencode-advisor-doctor.mjs')) { console.error('npm run doctor is only available from a source checkout.'); process.exit(1); return; } const { runDoctor, formatDoctorReport } = await import('./scripts/opencode-advisor-doctor.mjs'); const report = await runDoctor(); console.log(formatDoctorReport(report)); process.exit(report.ok ? 0 : 1); }).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.smoke: node -e "import('node:os').then(async ({ tmpdir }) => { const path = await import('node:path'); const m = await import('./src/server.mjs'); const env = { OPENCODE_ADVISOR_ALLOWED_ROOTS: process.cwd(), OPENCODE_ADVISOR_OPENCODE_DATA_HOME: path.join(tmpdir(), 'opencode-advisor-mcp-smoke-profile') }; m.createServer({ env }); if (m.parseAllowedRoots(undefined, {}).length !== 0) process.exit(1); let failed = false; try { m.createServer({ env: {} }); failed = true; } catch {} if (failed) process.exit(1); })"
